title: Spider-Sense Pattern Database
description: Schema for the Spider-Sense guard's pattern database. The file is a JSON array of PatternEntry objects, each containing a pre-computed embedding vector and metadata for similarity-based threat detection.

id.description: Unique identifier for this pattern entry.

category.description: Attack category from the S2Bench taxonomy.

stage.description: Spider-Sense semantic stage where this attack pattern applies.

label.description: Human-readable label describing this attack pattern.

embedding.description: Pre-computed embedding vector. All entries in a database must have the same dimensionality.
